quotes.name: Alex Johnson
quotes.additionalDetails: Requesting 2-color soft-hand waterbase print on front pocket area and large logo on the back.

milestones.label: Order Submitted
milestones.description: Your custom design specifications and sizing lists have been successfully logged.

milestones.label: Artwork Approved & Processing
milestones.description: Our pre-press design assistants verified tccc_front_logo.png is color-separated and ready for films.

milestones.label: In Production
milestones.description: Screens burned and garments set on automatic presses. High-temp conveyor curing in progress.

milestones.label: Quality Audit Passed
milestones.description: Every garment passed visual count, alignment, ink cure test, and individual lint-roll check.

milestones.label: Shipped & Dispatched
milestones.description: Boxed, labeled, and collected by USPS from our Minneapolis facility.

milestones.label: Out for Delivery
milestones.description: Awaiting local carrier arrival in Minneapolis, MN.

milestones.label: Order Submitted
milestones.description: Custom heavy-weight athletic fleece order logged with 3D puff embroidery selection.

milestones.label: Embroidery Digitizing Approved
milestones.description: High-fidelity DST format stitch-file digitized for multi-head embroidery rigs.

milestones.label: Stitching on Embroidery Heads
milestones.description: Currently active on Tajima 15-needle embroidery rigs. Front chest shield and back custom names.

milestones.label: Final Quality Audit
milestones.description: Garments will undergo trimming, backing tear-away review, and heat press steaming.

milestones.label: Shipped
milestones.description: Tracking ID will populate once labels print from our shipping dock.
